TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Barnhill, title = John_Barnhill, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Barnhill} }

S.FORM: John Barnhill sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1938, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 3, John Barnhill, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

John Barnhill sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1938, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 3, John Barnhill, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oħn βarnħill s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *oħn βarnħill, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
